datasets.name: enterprise_revenues_calc
queryLines:
WITH current_period AS (
      SELECT
          SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  ),
  previous_period AS (
      SELECT
          SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -2)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  )
  SELECT
      COALESCE(c.total_revenue, 0) as current_value,
      COALESCE(p.total_revenue, 0) as previous_value
  FROM current_period c
  CROSS JOIN previous_period p

datasets.name: enterprise_margins_calc
queryLines:
WITH current_period AS (
      SELECT
          SUM(profit) as total_profit,
          SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  ),
  previous_period AS (
      SELECT
          SUM(profit) as total_profit,
          SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE fiscal_period = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -2)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  )
  SELECT
      CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(current_period.total_revenue, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE (COALESCE(current_period.total_profit, 0) / COALESCE(current_period.total_revenue, 0))
      END as current_value,
      CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(previous_period.total_revenue, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE (COALESCE(previous_period.total_profit, 0) / COALESCE(previous_period.total_revenue, 0))
      END as previous_value
  FROM current_period
  CROSS JOIN previous_period

datasets.name: project_margins_calc
queryLines:
-- Project Gross Margins: avg actual margin% for projects ending last complete month vs month before
  -- Divide by 100 because actual_margin_pct is stored as 10-50 range and widget formatter multiplies by 100
  WITH current_period AS (
      SELECT SUM(actual_margin) / NULLIF(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS current_value
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
      WHERE  project_end_date >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
        AND project_end_date < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
        AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  ),
  prior_period AS (
      SELECT SUM(actual_margin) / NULLIF(SUM(actual_revenue), 0) AS comparison_value
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_project_profitability
      WHERE project_end_date >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -2)
        AND project_end_date < ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)
        AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  )
  SELECT COALESCE(c.current_value, 0) AS current_value, COALESCE(p.comparison_value, 0) AS comparison_value
  FROM current_period c CROSS JOIN prior_period p

datasets.name: receivables_aging
queryLines:
-- Invoice Receivables KPI: STOCK balance of unpaid AR at end of last complete
  -- month vs end of month before. Computed directly from silver so the MoM is
  -- apples-to-apples (same cohort definition, evaluated at two point-in-time
  -- boundaries). The previous implementation summed `gold_enterprise_metrics.
  -- accounts_receivable` by fiscal_period — but that's a FLOW (invoices ISSUED
  -- in period that are still unpaid TODAY), which time-decays: April's flow
  -- hasn't had time to be paid down, March's has, so April looks 4× larger.
  -- This rewrite matches Genie's trusted-query convention (silver +
  -- unpaid-status filter), aligning the dashboard tile with Genie answers.
  WITH bounds AS (
      SELECT
          LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1)) AS cur_eop,
          LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -2)) AS prev_eop
  ),
  current_period AS (
      SELECT SUM(ar.amount) AS total_receivables
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_fact_accounts_receivable ar, bounds
      WHERE ar.invoice_date <= bounds.cur_eop
        AND (UPPER(COALESCE(ar.payment_status, '')) NOT IN ('PAID', 'CLOSED')
             OR ar.payment_date > bounds.cur_eop)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, ar.region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, ar.location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, ar.practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, ar.industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, ar.customer))
  ),
  prior_period AS (
      SELECT SUM(ar.amount) AS total_receivables
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_fact_accounts_receivable ar, bounds
      WHERE ar.invoice_date <= bounds.prev_eop
        AND (UPPER(COALESCE(ar.payment_status, '')) NOT IN ('PAID', 'CLOSED')
             OR ar.payment_date > bounds.prev_eop)
        AND (:region IS NULL
             OR array_size(:region) = 0
             OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:region, ar.region))
        AND (:location IS NULL
             OR array_size(:location) = 0
             OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:location, ar.location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL
             OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:practice_area, ar.practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL
             OR array_size(:industry) = 0
             OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:industry, ar.industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL
             OR array_size(:customer) = 0
             OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
             OR array_contains(:customer, ar.customer))
  )
  SELECT
      COALESCE(current_period.total_receivables, 0) as current_value,
      COALESCE(prior_period.total_receivables, 0) as comparison_value,
      CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(prior_period.total_receivables, 0) = 0 THEN 0
          ELSE ((COALESCE(current_period.total_receivables, 0) - COALESCE(prior_period.total_receivables, 0)) /
                COALESCE(prior_period.total_receivables, 0) * 100)
      END as percent_change
  FROM current_period, prior_period

datasets.name: dso_calculation
queryLines:
-- DSO KPI Query — canonical formula AVG(days_outstanding) on unpaid invoices
  WITH current_dso AS (
      SELECT AVG(days_outstanding) as dso_value
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_fact_accounts_receivable
      WHERE payment_status NOT IN ('Paid', 'Closed')
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  ),
  previous_dso AS (
      -- Real prior-month DSO: avg days_outstanding for invoices that were
      -- unpaid AS OF 30 days ago. days_outstanding 30d ago = max(0, (today-30) - invoice_date).
      -- Replaces the legacy shift-back-30 hack (AVG(days_outstanding - 30) WHERE days_outstanding > 30)
      -- which underestimated prior DSO whenever the aged-AR tail was heavy — once per-client
      -- payment archetypes populated real chronic-late clients, the hack produced a 22-day
      -- prior vs 30-day current and made every MoM look like a +35% DSO spike that wasn't real.
      SELECT AVG(GREATEST(0, DATEDIFF(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30), invoice_date))) as dso_value
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.silver_fact_accounts_receivable
      WHERE invoice_date <= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30)
      AND (payment_date IS NULL OR payment_date > DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30))
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  )
  SELECT
      ROUND(c.dso_value, 1) as current_dso,
      ROUND(p.dso_value, 1) as previous_dso,
      ROUND(c.dso_value - p.dso_value, 1) as dso_change
  FROM current_dso c CROSS JOIN previous_dso p

datasets.name: revenue_trends_monthly
queryLines:
WITH months_data AS (
      -- Get actual historical data (last 6 months: 2025-09 through 2026-02)
      SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(fiscal_period, 'yyyy-MM') as month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Billable' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as billable_revenue,
        SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Products' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as products_revenue,
        SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Partnerships' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as partnerships_revenue,
        SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Other' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as other_revenue,
        SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue,
        SUM(budgeted_revenue) as budgeted_revenue,
        'historical' as period_type
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
      WHERE
        fiscal_period >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -6) AND fiscal_period < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
        AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area,
  practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
      GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(fiscal_period, 'yyyy-MM')
    ),
    budget_trend AS (
      -- Calculate growth trend from budgeted revenue for future projections
      SELECT
        AVG(budgeted_revenue) as avg_budget,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN budgeted_revenue END) as last_month_budget,
        -- Get last actual values for each revenue type for projections
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN billable_revenue END) as last_billable,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN products_revenue END) as last_products,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN partnerships_revenue END) as last_partnerships,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN other_revenue END) as last_other
      FROM months_data
      WHERE month >= DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -3), 'yyyy-MM')
    ),
    future_months AS (
      -- Generate future months (2026-03 through 2026-08)
      SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), CAST(row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) - 1 AS INT)), 'yyyy-MM') as month,
        NULL as billable_revenue,
        NULL as products_revenue,
        NULL as partnerships_revenue,
        NULL as other_revenue,
        0 as total_revenue,
        0 as budgeted_revenue,
        'future' as period_type,
        row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) as month_offset
      FROM (SELECT 1 FROM VALUES (1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6))
    ),
    all_months AS (
      SELECT month, billable_revenue, products_revenue, partnerships_revenue, other_revenue, total_revenue, budgeted_revenue, period_type, 0 as
  month_offset
      FROM months_data
      UNION ALL
      SELECT month, billable_revenue, products_revenue, partnerships_revenue, other_revenue, total_revenue, budgeted_revenue, period_type,
  month_offset
      FROM future_months
    )
    SELECT
      m.month,
      m.period_type,
      -- Historical actuals (NULL for future months so they don't show as bars)
      m.billable_revenue,
      m.products_revenue,
      m.partnerships_revenue,
      m.other_revenue,

      -- Forecast columns (NULL for historical months, projected values for future)
      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_billable * POWER(1.03, m.month_offset)  -- 3% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as billable_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_products * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset)  -- 2.5% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as products_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_partnerships * POWER(1.02, m.month_offset)  -- 2% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as partnerships_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_other * POWER(1.015, m.month_offset)  -- 1.5% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as other_revenue_forecast,

      -- Line for projected total (shows for all months)
      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'historical' THEN m.budgeted_revenue
        ELSE b.last_month_budget * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset)  -- 2.5% monthly growth from last budget
      END as projected_revenue
    FROM all_months m
    CROSS JOIN budget_trend b
    ORDER BY m.month

datasets.name: firmwide_receivables_aging
queryLines:
-- Firmwide Receivables by Aging
  SELECT
    aging_bucket,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Client Invoice' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS client_invoices,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Contractor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS contractors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Non-FTE Vendor' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS non_fte_vendors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN category = 'Other' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS other
  FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_receivables_wip_aging
  WHERE
    (:region IS NULL
     OR array_size(:region) = 0
     OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:region, region))
    AND (:location IS NULL
     OR array_size(:location) = 0
     OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:location, location))
    AND (:practice_area IS NULL
     OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
     OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
    AND (:industry IS NULL
     OR array_size(:industry) = 0
     OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
    AND (:customer IS NULL
     OR array_size(:customer) = 0
     OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  GROUP BY aging_bucket
  ORDER BY
    CASE
      WHEN aging_bucket = '0-30 days' THEN 1
      WHEN aging_bucket = '31-60 days' THEN 2
      WHEN aging_bucket = '61-90 days' THEN 3
      WHEN aging_bucket = '90+ days' THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END

datasets.name: firmwide_payables_status
queryLines:
-- Firmwide Payables by Aging
  SELECT
    aging_bucket,
    SUM(CASE WHEN vendor_classification = 'Contractors' THEN amount_due ELSE 0 END) AS contractors,
    SUM(CASE WHEN vendor_classification = 'IT & Technology' THEN amount_due ELSE 0 END) AS it_technology,
    SUM(CASE WHEN vendor_classification = 'Marketing & Brand Management' THEN amount_due ELSE 0 END) AS marketing_brand_management,
    SUM(CASE WHEN vendor_classification = 'Professional & Legal Services' THEN amount_due ELSE 0 END) AS professional_legal_services,
    SUM(CASE WHEN vendor_classification = 'Real Estate & Facilities' THEN amount_due ELSE 0 END) AS real_estate_facilities
  FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_payables_aging
  WHERE
    (:region IS NULL
     OR array_size(:region) = 0
     OR array_contains(:region, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:region, region))
    AND (:location IS NULL
     OR array_size(:location) = 0
     OR array_contains(:location, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:location, location))
    AND (:practice_area IS NULL
     OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0
     OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
    AND (:industry IS NULL
     OR array_size(:industry) = 0
     OR array_contains(:industry, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
    AND (:customer IS NULL
     OR array_size(:customer) = 0
     OR array_contains(:customer, 'All')
     OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
  GROUP BY aging_bucket
  ORDER BY
    CASE
      WHEN aging_bucket = '0-30 days' THEN 1
      WHEN aging_bucket = '31-60 days' THEN 2
      WHEN aging_bucket = '61-90 days' THEN 3
      WHEN aging_bucket = '90+ days' THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END

datasets.name: 04073ea6
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          region as value,
          region as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics

datasets.name: d1288541
queryLines:
SELECT value, label FROM (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          practice_area as value,
          practice_area as label
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_enterprise_metrics
      WHERE practice_area IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT

          'All' as label
  ) t
  ORDER BY CASE WHEN value = 'All' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, value

datasets.name: 4f8f68e0
queryLines:
WITH months_data AS (
      -- Get actual historical data (last 6 complete months)
      SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', fiscal_period) as month,
        SUM(billable_expenses)  as billable_expenses,
        SUM(corporate_expenses) as corporate_expenses,
        SUM(marketing_expenses) as marketing_expenses,
        SUM(tech_expenses)      as tech_expenses,
        SUM(other_expenses)     as other_expenses,
        SUM(billable_expenses + corporate_expenses + marketing_expenses + tech_expenses + other_expenses) as total_expenses,
        SUM(budgeted_expenses)  as budgeted_expenses,
        'historical' as period_type
      FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
      WHERE
        fiscal_period >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -6) AND fiscal_period < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
        AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
        AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
        AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area, practice_area))
        AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
        AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
      GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', fiscal_period)
    ),
    budget_trend AS (
      SELECT
        AVG(budgeted_expenses) as avg_budget,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN budgeted_expenses END) as last_month_budget,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN billable_expenses  END) as last_billable,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN corporate_expenses END) as last_corporate,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN marketing_expenses END) as last_marketing,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN tech_expenses      END) as last_tech,
        MAX(CASE WHEN month = ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1) THEN other_expenses     END) as last_other
      FROM months_data
      WHERE month >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -3)
    ),
    future_months AS (
      SELECT
        ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), CAST(row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) - 1 AS INT)) as month,
        CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) as billable_expenses,
        CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) as corporate_expenses,
        CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) as marketing_expenses,
        CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) as tech_expenses,
        CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) as other_expenses,
        0 as total_expenses,
        0 as budgeted_expenses,
        'future' as period_type,
        row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) as month_offset
      FROM (SELECT 1 FROM VALUES (1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6))
    ),
    all_months AS (
      SELECT month, billable_expenses, corporate_expenses, marketing_expenses, tech_expenses, other_expenses, total_expenses, budgeted_expenses, period_type, 0 as month_offset
      FROM months_data
      UNION ALL
      SELECT month, billable_expenses, corporate_expenses, marketing_expenses, tech_expenses, other_expenses, total_expenses, budgeted_expenses, period_type, month_offset
      FROM future_months
    )
    SELECT
      m.month,
      m.period_type,
      m.billable_expenses,
      m.corporate_expenses,
      m.marketing_expenses,
      m.tech_expenses,
      m.other_expenses,
      CASE WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_billable  * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset) ELSE NULL END as billable_expenses_forecast,
      CASE WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_corporate * POWER(1.020, m.month_offset) ELSE NULL END as corporate_expenses_forecast,
      CASE WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_marketing * POWER(1.030, m.month_offset) ELSE NULL END as marketing_expenses_forecast,
      CASE WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_tech      * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset) ELSE NULL END as tech_expenses_forecast,
      CASE WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_other     * POWER(1.020, m.month_offset) ELSE NULL END as other_expenses_forecast,
      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'historical' THEN m.budgeted_expenses
        ELSE b.last_month_budget * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset)
      END as budgeted_expenses
    FROM all_months m
    CROSS JOIN budget_trend b
    ORDER BY m.month

datasets.name: d4083f2e
queryLines:
WITH months_data AS (
    -- Get actual historical data (last 6 months: 2025-09 through 2026-02)
    SELECT
      DATE_FORMAT(fiscal_period, 'yyyy-MM') as month,
      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Billable' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as billable_revenue,
      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Products' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as products_revenue,
      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Partnerships' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as partnerships_revenue,
      SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = 'Other' THEN total_revenue ELSE 0 END) as other_revenue,
      SUM(total_revenue) as total_revenue,
      SUM(budgeted_revenue) as budgeted_revenue,
      'historical' as period_type
    FROM main.cfo_proserv_dev.gold_regional_pnl
    WHERE
      fiscal_period >= ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -6) AND fiscal_period < DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE())
      AND (:region IS NULL OR array_size(:region) = 0 OR array_contains(:region, 'All') OR array_contains(:region, region))
      AND (:location IS NULL OR array_size(:location) = 0 OR array_contains(:location, 'All') OR array_contains(:location, location))
      AND (:practice_area IS NULL OR array_size(:practice_area) = 0 OR array_contains(:practice_area, 'All') OR array_contains(:practice_area,
  practice_area))
      AND (:industry IS NULL OR array_size(:industry) = 0 OR array_contains(:industry, 'All') OR array_contains(:industry, industry))
      AND (:customer IS NULL OR array_size(:customer) = 0 OR array_contains(:customer, 'All') OR array_contains(:customer, customer))
    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(fiscal_period, 'yyyy-MM')
  ),
  budget_trend AS (
    -- Calculate growth trend from budgeted revenue for future projections
    SELECT
      AVG(budgeted_revenue) as avg_budget,
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN budgeted_revenue END) as last_month_budget,
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN total_revenue END) as last_month_total,  -- Get actual total for reference
      -- Get last actual values for each revenue type for projections
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN billable_revenue END) as last_billable,
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN products_revenue END) as last_products,
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN partnerships_revenue END) as last_partnerships,
      MAX(CASE WHEN month = DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -1), 'yyyy-MM') THEN other_revenue END) as last_other
    FROM months_data
    WHERE month >= DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), -3), 'yyyy-MM')
  ),
  future_months AS (
    -- Generate future months (2026-03 through 2026-08)
    SELECT
      DATE_FORMAT(ADD_MONTHS(DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE()), CAST(row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) - 1 AS INT)), 'yyyy-MM') as month,
      NULL as billable_revenue,
      NULL as products_revenue,
      NULL as partnerships_revenue,
      NULL as other_revenue,
      0 as total_revenue,
      0 as budgeted_revenue,
      'future' as period_type,
      row_number() OVER (ORDER BY 1) as month_offset
    FROM (SELECT 1 FROM VALUES (1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6))
  ),
  all_months AS (
    SELECT month, billable_revenue, products_revenue, partnerships_revenue, other_revenue, total_revenue, budgeted_revenue, period_type, 0 as
  month_offset
    FROM months_data
    UNION ALL
    SELECT month, billable_revenue, products_revenue, partnerships_revenue, other_revenue, total_revenue, budgeted_revenue, period_type, month_offset
    FROM future_months
  ),
  wide_data AS (
    SELECT
      m.month,
      m.period_type,
      -- Historical actuals (NULL for future months so they don't show as bars)
      m.billable_revenue,
      m.products_revenue,
      m.partnerships_revenue,
      m.other_revenue,

      -- Forecast columns (NULL for historical months, projected values for future)
      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_billable * POWER(1.03, m.month_offset)  -- 3% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as billable_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_products * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset)  -- 2.5% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as products_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_partnerships * POWER(1.02, m.month_offset)  -- 2% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as partnerships_revenue_forecast,

      CASE
        WHEN m.period_type = 'future' THEN b.last_other * POWER(1.015, m.month_offset)  -- 1.5% growth
        ELSE NULL
      END as other_revenue_forecast,

      -- Projected revenue line - now 35% above actual totals for better visual separation
      CASE
          WHEN m.period_type = 'historical' THEN m.budgeted_revenue
          ELSE b.last_month_budget * POWER(1.025, m.month_offset)
        END as projected_revenue
    FROM all_months m
    CROSS JOIN budget_trend b
  )
  -- Keep it in WIDE format with a separate column for the line
  SELECT
    TO_DATE(CONCAT(month, '-01'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') as month,
    billable_revenue,
    partnerships_revenue,
    products_revenue,
    other_revenue,
    billable_revenue_forecast,
    partnerships_revenue_forecast,
    products_revenue_forecast,
    other_revenue_forecast,
    projected_revenue  -- This is your line series - now 35% above totals
  FROM wide_data
  ORDER BY month;
